text:
Time-saving detangling conditioner nourish replenish moisture that your curls lacking reduce appearance dryness, frizz, breakage.
After shampooing with Natural Almond Avocado Moisturizing Detangling Sulfate Free Shampoo, apply Natural Almond Avocado Moisturizing Detangling Conditioner comb through.
Allow minutes.
Rinse thoroughly.
Water (Aqua), Cetyl Alcohol, Behentrimonium Chloride, Adomethicone (and) Cetrimonium Chloride (and) Trideceth-12, Glycol Distearate, Glycol Stearate, Phenoxethanol (and) Benzoic Acid (and) Dehydroacetic Acid, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis (Sweet Almond) Oil, Propylene Glycol (and) Water (and) Persea Gratissima (Avocado) Leaf Extract, Persea Gratissima (and) Hydrogenated Vegetable (Avocado Butter), Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis (and) Hydrogenated Vegetable (Almond Butter), Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Fragrance (Parfum), Sodium PCA, Tocopheryl acetate, Citric Acid, Benzyl Benzoate, Citral, Geraniol, Hydroxyisohexyl 3-cyclohexene carboxaldehyde, Limonene, Linalool, Butylphenyl methylpropanal.
